detectors.description:

	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (ZombieInu.sol#759)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ZombieInu._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ZombieInu.sol#621-723):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ZombieInu.sol#695)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ZombieInu.sol#737-749)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ZombieInu.sol#701)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (ZombieInu.sol#757)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (ZombieInu.sol#759)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ZombieInu.sol#721)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ZombieInu.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ZombieInu.sol#909)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ZombieInu.sol#911)
	ZombieInu._rOwned (ZombieInu.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ZombieInu._takeTeam(uint256) (ZombieInu.sol#923-931)
	- ZombieInu._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ZombieInu.sol#883-919)
	- ZombieInu.balanceOf(address) (ZombieInu.sol#447-451)
	- ZombieInu.constructor(address,address) (ZombieInu.sol#393-411)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ZombieInu.sol#721)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ZombieInu.sol#937)
	ZombieInu._rTotal (ZombieInu.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ZombieInu._getCurrentSupply() (ZombieInu.sol#1079-1089)
	- ZombieInu._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ZombieInu.sol#935-941)
	- ZombieInu.constructor(address,address) (ZombieInu.sol#393-411)
	- ZombieInu.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ZombieInu.sol#551-573)

	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ZombieInu.sol#781-795)

	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ZombieInu.sol#781-795)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (ZombieInu.sol#803)
	ZombieInu.tradingOpen (ZombieInu.sol#367) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ZombieInu.openTrading() (ZombieInu.sol#765-813)
